SEARCH
程序包 mypakege

类 StudentList

java.lang.Object
mypakege.StudentList
public class StudentList extends Object
A resizable array-based list of Student objects. The initial capacity is 4 and grows by 4 when full. This class supports adding/removing students and printing the list sorted by last name, first name, then date of birth (via Student.compareTo()).
作者:
HIrotaku Hayashi hh635, junjie Xia jx309

    add(Student student)

    Finds the index of a student in the list using Student.equals(Object).

    Returns the Student object whose profile matches the given profile.

    Returns the number of students currently in the list.

    sort()
    Sorts the list in-place using selection sort.

  • 字段详细资料

    • NOT_FOUND

      private static final int NOT_FOUND
      另请参阅:
      • 常量字段值

    • CAPACITY

      private static final int CAPACITY
      另请参阅:

    • list

      private Student[] list

    • size

      private int size

  • 构造器详细资料

    • StudentList

      public StudentList()
      Constructs an empty StudentList with the initial capacity.

  • 方法详细资料

    • find

      private int find(Student student)
      Finds the index of a student in the list using Student.equals(Object).
      参数:
      student - the student to search for
      返回:
      the index if found; NOT_FOUND otherwise

    • grow

      private void grow()
      Grows the backing array by CAPACITY. Existing elements are copied into the new array.

    • contains

      public boolean contains(Student student)
      Checks whether the list contains the given student.
      参数:
      student - the student to check
      返回:
      true if the student exists in the list; false otherwise

    • get

      public Student get(Profile p)
      Returns the Student object whose profile matches the given profile.
      参数:
      p - the profile to search for
      返回:
      the matching Student if found; null otherwise

    • add

      public void add(Student student)
      Adds a student to the end of the list. If the list is full, the backing array will grow first.
      参数:
      student - the student to add

    • remove

      public boolean remove(Student student)
      Removes a student from the list if present. The removed element is replaced by the last element (order not preserved), then the size is decremented.
      参数:
      student - the student to remove
      返回:
      true if the student was found and removed; false otherwise

    • size

      public int size()
      Returns the number of students currently in the list.
      返回:
      the size of the list

    • sort

      private void sort()
      Sorts the list in-place using selection sort. Ordering is determined by Student.compareTo(Student).

    • print

      public void print()
      Prints the students ordered by last name, first name, then date of birth. If the list is empty, prints "Student list is empty!".
